name: ExtendedFrameRate
title: ExtendedFrameRate
description: Returns the current rate of extended CAN messages on channel x.
return: Current rate of extended CAN messages on channel x in messages per second.

example.code:
write ("Rate of extended frames on CAN1 = %d", 
 CAN1.ExtendedFrameRate);

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
— (since version 8.0) (deprecated, replaced by predefined system variable sysvar::_Statistics::CANn::,for details see system variables for statistics.)
— (since version 8.0) (deprecated, replaced by predefined system variable sysvar::_Statistics::CANn::,for details see system variables for statistics.)
